P

Passenger - Class in proj4
Implements the Passenger class.
Passenger() - Constructor for class proj4.Passenger
No-arg constructor that creates a default passenger with empty String as a name, 0 as the id, 0.0 as the balance, and a null ticket.
Passenger(String, int, double) - Constructor for class proj4.Passenger
Parameterized constructor that takes a name as a String, an int ID, a balance as as double, and a null ticket.
PassengerTest - Class in proj4
 
PassengerTest() - Constructor for class proj4.PassengerTest
 
payFare(double, boolean, boolean) - Method in class proj4.ChildPassenger
Overrides payFare so that the passenger only pays half of the fare.
payFare(double, boolean, boolean) - Method in class proj4.Passenger
If the fare is valid, and the passenger has enough balance, deduct the fare from the passenger's balance and return true.
payFare(double, boolean, boolean) - Method in class proj4.SeniorPassenger
Overrides payFare so that the passenger receives a 30% discount.
Person - Class in proj4
Implements the Person class.
Person() - Constructor for class proj4.Person
No-arg constructor that creates a default person with an empty Sting as a name and 0 as the id.
Person(String, int) - Constructor for class proj4.Person
Parameterized constructor that takes a Person name and ID.
